mapper.sql: id, applicant_id, title, status, total_amount, submitted_at, approved_at, approved_by, returned_at, return_reason, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT ea.id, ea.applicant_id, u.name AS applicant_name, ea.title, ea.status, ea.total_amount, ea.submitted_at, ea.created_at, ea.updated_at FROM expense_applications ea INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = ea.applicant_id
ORDER BY ea.created_at DESC, ea.id DESC LIMIT #{condition.size} OFFSET #{condition.offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM expense_applications ea INNER JOIN users u ON u.id = ea.applicant_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO expense_applications ( applicant_id, title, status, total_amount ) VALUES ( #{applicantId}, #{title}, #{status}, #{totalAmount} )
mapper.update: UPDATE expense_applications SET title = #{title}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, return_reason = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE expense_applications SET total_amount = #{totalAmount}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE expense_applications SET status = 'SUBMITTED', submitted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, returned_at = NULL, return_reason = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE expense_applications SET status = 'APPROVED', approved_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, approved_by = #{approverId}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE expense_applications SET status = 'RETURNED', returned_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, return_reason = #{returnReason}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
